prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily log returns for Visa (V) over the past three years were used to estimate the daily drift (mean log return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns). Approximately 10,000 simulations were run, projecting the price over 22 trading days. The point estimate is the median of these simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the respective percentiles of the simulated price distribution. The current price of $320.51 serves as the starting point for all simulations.
